executives.name: Mary Hogan Preusse
executives.background: Ms. Hogan Preusse has served as Chairman of the Board since 2022. She was formerly Managing Director and co-head of Americas Real Estate at APG Asset Management US.

board_of_directors.name: Milton Cooper
board_of_directors.background: Former President of the North American Public Sector at Computer Sciences Corporation (CSC). Extensive experience in government contracting and IT services.
